text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
This diamond is of flawless clarity! Satono
Diamond has triumphed in the Osaka Hai!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond didn't even give her opponents
a chance! She ran as beautifully as always.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Her run today reminds me of the rapid progress
Kitasan Black made last year. Or maybe she's
improved even more than that...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I know Kitasan Black isn't just gonna accept
defeat. Their rivalry is far from over!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Both Kita and Dia are getting so much better!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
In which way do you mean exactly? ...Not that I
don't agree.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Watching them race kinda reminds me of our own
duel.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: You mean at the spring Tenno Sho?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Perhaps that will be their next race as well.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Maybe! By the way...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I reeeaaally feel like running right now!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh? What a coincidence. So do I.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Let's race back to the station on our way home!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Yes. I'd like that.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Arghhh! I'm so frustrated! It was my goal to win all
the traditional senior-year races!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe I messed it up in the very first race!
Gaaah!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: C-calm down, Kita!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I just couldn't pull away from you! You have no
idea how hard I trained for today!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
And you still caught up to me! Or I should say you
surpassed me. I let my guard down when it
mattered most!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Arghhh!
But I knew you had it in you!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! It takes everything I have to not fall behind
you!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Still, I'm glad we could have an all-out race! I
wanna run with you more!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I wanna beat you when you're at your best! So... I
want you to enter the spring Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
The spring Tenno Sho... So you're aiming for a
consecutive win?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yep! At 3,200 meters, it's the longest G1 race. I
wanna run it with you.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Talk to your Trainer and give it some thought.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I'll be waiting for you in Kyoto!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: So, Trainer... About my next race...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Yes! ...But how did you know?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond said she wanted to pursue
Kitasan Black while thinking about what it means
to be illustrious.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If Kitasan Black is her goal, it stands to reason
that she'd want to enter the same races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And knowing Satono Diamond, she'd have extra
motivation for the spring Tenno Sho, a race where
Kitasan Black excels and is aiming for consecutive
victories.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You see right through me. Hm... If that's the case,
it shouldn't be a problem if I decide things on the
spot next time.
choice_data_list: I'd rather we at least discuss it first!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I'm just kidding. ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Next is the spring Tenno Sho. I'd like to bring the
honor of a win in that legendary race to the
Satono family.
